lore_background.title: The Master Ironsmith
lore_background.derived_character_themes: Infantry ironsmith with hammer-based combat. Skill flavor text references "passion for iron mining", "special bond with Iron", and his signature "Hammer Burn" — suggesting a dedicated craftsman-warrior identity.

deep_analysis: Seth is a Rare infantry gathering hero — the iron-focused specialist completing the R-grade gathering quartet (Edwin/stone, Forrest/wood, Olive/bread, Seth/iron). His Expedition boosts Town Iron Output and Wilderness Iron Gathering Speed by up to +25%. Conquest kit features Hammer Burn (up to Attack × 280%, the highest base scaling of the 4 Rare gatherers) and Armor Enhancement (+30% self damage reduction). Essential for farm accounts.

effect_op_codes.description: Rare-tier gathering hero — no rally joiner effect_op code (not a combat hero)
effect_op_codes.source: kingshothandbook.com (rare tier heroes not in effect_op stacking system)

named_pairs.note: Seth specializes iron, Diana provides stamina reduction

best_partners.source: kingshothandbook.com effect_op stacking math + community lineup guides

order: Max Burnished Iron FIRST (Expedition — +25% Iron Output)
Conquest is filler — Seth is a gatherer

gear_recommendations.reasoning: Standard infantry archetype at rare tier. Derived from community gear build templates (allclash.com Zoe guide as canonical base for infantry, confirmed by community consensus across allclash, heaven-guardian, kingshothandbook build guides).
sources: allclash.com Zoe build guide (canonical infantry template)

counters.reason: No public source documents explicit hero-vs-hero counter matchups for Kingshot. Community discussions reference troop-type rock-paper-scissors (Infantry > Cavalry > Archer > Infantry) and formation-based counters but not specific hero counters. Check Discord/Reddit for player-tested matchups.
